Name: American Ballet Theatre
Tagline: PERFORMANCES METROPOLITAN OPERA HOUSE Summer Season Group Sales DAVID H.
About: American Ballet Theatre is an internationally celebrated cultural institution. We are America’s National Ballet Company® because we are dedicated to preserving and extending the great legacy of classical dancing.
Philosophy: At ABT, we know that by sharing art we can develop a global community of art enthusiasts that transcends cultural boundaries. The American Ballet Theatre team – from staff, artists, and our Board of Trustees, to our dedicated volunteers – works tirelessly to produce innovative performances, reach the widest possible audience, and provide the highest quality education in classical dance.
Outcomes: Graduates of the American Ballet Theatre have gone on to join prestigious companies worldwide, including the Royal Ballet and Paris Opera Ballet. Alumni have also achieved success in Broadway productions and international dance competitions.
Admissions: Prospective students must audition to join the American Ballet Theatre, with auditions typically held annually. The process includes a review of technical skills and artistic potential, and applicants are encouraged to apply early for consideration.
Quote: This website has been made possible by Karen Phillips and Infor.

Performance.Facilities & Resources: Join us in Costa Mesa, California for one of the sweetest treats of the holiday season: American Ballet Theatre’s critically acclaimed production of The Nutcracker. Travel with curious Clara and her adventurous prince as they journey through a kingdom filled with colorful characters and pure holiday magic.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: American Ballet Theatre’s Summer Intensive has earned a reputation for being the most thorough and rewarding dance experience a student can have during the summer. Under the supervision of ABT’s Artistic Director Susan Jaffe and Artistic Director of Summer Intensives Kate Lydon, the program offers top quality teachers and master guest teachers that are dedicated to the learning process and growth of each individual student.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Students of ABT’s Summer Intensive are exposed to a level of training unmatched by any other summer program. The faculty consists of ABT alumni, current ABT Company Dancers, guest teachers, accomplished pianists, and ABT artistic staff.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Partnering with schools and local organizations, ABT provides an array of accessible opportunities to experience world-class repertory and artistry. Aligned with our mission to bring the magic of ballet to the widest audience possible, programs are designed to introduce the classical repertoire and a proficiency in movement vocabulary.
Performance.Academic Integration: American Ballet Theatre offers a rigorous curriculum that includes classical ballet technique, pointe, character dance, and contemporary dance. Students can also participate in specialized workshops focusing on choreography and stagecraft to enhance their artistic development.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress at American Ballet Theatre is meticulously tracked through trimester evaluations and personalized feedback sessions. The institution adheres to NYSAIS standards, ensuring high-quality education and regular parent-artist conferences to discuss development.
